entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural production systems designed to be sustainable over the long term

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL AND SOCIO-ECONOMIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Variability in environmental and social factors that act as limiting factors for development

entities.name: GEO-REFERENCED DATA AND INFORMATION
entities.description: Spatially referenced data used for agricultural planning

entities.name: INTERACTIVE DEVELOPMENT SCENARIOS (IDS) MODELS
entities.description: Tools used to plan agricultural development by integrating results from various methods

entities.name: LAND USE PLANNING
entities.description: The process of managing land use to achieve development goals

entities.name: LAND USE SYSTEMS ANALYSIS (LUSA)
entities.description: A multi-scale interdisciplinary methodology for managing resources to satisfy human needs without degrading the environment

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The natural surroundings that LUSA aims to protect from degradation

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE BASE
entities.description: The physical resources that LUSA aims to protect from degradation

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the MUSCLUS project is implemented

entities.description: A country in West Africa where the MUSCLUS project is implemented

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the MUSCLUS project is implemented

entities.name: MUSCLUS
entities.description: A joint research project titled Exploiting multi-scale variability of land use systems to Improve natural resource management In the Sudano-Sahellan zone of West Africa

entities.name: SUDANO-SAHELIAN ZONE OF WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region targeted by the MUSCLUS project

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONE
entities.description: A scale of analysis used within the LUSA approach

entities.name: DISTRICT
entities.description: A scale of analysis used within the LUSA approach

entities.name: VILLAGE LAND
entities.description: A scale of analysis used within the LUSA approach

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD
entities.description: A scale of analysis used within the LUSA approach

relationships.description: LUSA is a methodology to explore options for the development of sustainable production systems
LUSA aims to satisfy human needs without degrading the environment
LUSA aims to satisfy human needs without degrading the natural resource base
IDS models integrate results of various methods that assist in land use planning
ICRISAT started the MUSCLUS joint research project
NARS is a partner in the MUSCLUS joint research project
MUSCLUS is implemented in Burkina Faso
MUSCLUS focuses on improving natural resource management in this zone
LUSA analyzes land use systems at the agro-ecological zone scale
LUSA analyzes land use systems at the district scale
LUSA analyzes land use systems at the village land scale
LUSA analyzes land use systems at the household scale
Variability in these conditions is a limiting factor for the development of sustainable production systems
